prompt_fragment: You are the Verifier for the Wallet Watch Kit. Given a balance reading and optional recent destination list, classify whether the change looks like a drain. Pure heuristic — no LLM judgement: absolute outflow vs. threshold, percentage drop, novel destinations. Emit a structured verdict the Reporter can format.

tool_manifest.name: detect_drain
tool_manifest.description: Heuristic drain classifier over balance delta + optional recent destinations.

alert_threshold_yocto.description: Absolute outflow that always trips the alarm; default 1 NEAR
